name: restaurant-finder
description: Custom MCP tool for OpenTable: findAvailability returns restaurants with open tables.

tools.name: findAvailability
tools.description: Self-contained: navigates to OpenTable search and returns restaurants with open tables (name, cuisine, rating, price, available times) for a city/date/time/party/cuisine.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
